message:
Add background sync mode to prevent blocking Claude startup

- Add --background flag to sync command that forks process and returns immediately
- Update SessionStart hook to use --background mode
- Maintains full synchronous mode for manual usage
- Resolves startup blocking issue while preserving async: true hook setting

Usage:
- Manual sync: episodic-memory sync (runs synchronously)
- Hook sync: episodic-memory sync --background (returns immediately)

This ensures Claude Code startup is never blocked by sync operations
while still allowing full sync functionality when run manually.
